## Problem
What problem does this solve?

## Proposed API Design
```
METHOD /api/v1/new-endpoint
Body: { "field": "value" }
Response: { "result": "data" }
```

## Database Changes
- [ ] New model needed
- [ ] Existing model changes
- [ ] No DB changes

## HIPAA Impact
Does this touch PHI? Does it need audit logging?

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you've considered.
